mapper.sql: SELECT tb.id, sc.id AS sc_id, sc.code AS sc_code, sc.name AS sc_name, c.id AS stock_cell_id, c.code AS stock_cell_code, c.name AS stock_cell_name, c.cell_type AS stock_cell_type, p.id AS product_id, s.id AS sku_id, s.code AS sku_code, s.sale_property_text AS sale_property_text, p.code AS product_code, p.name AS product_name, p.spec AS spec, p.unit AS unit, pc.id AS category_id, pc.code AS category_code, pc.name AS category_name, pb.id AS brand_id, pb.code AS brand_code, pb.name AS brand_name FROM tbl_stock_cell_product AS tb JOIN base_data_store_center AS sc ON sc.id = tb.sc_id AND sc.available = TRUE JOIN base_data_stock_cell AS c ON c.id = tb.stock_cell_id AND c.available = TRUE JOIN base_data_product_sku AS s ON s.id = tb.sku_id AND s.available = TRUE JOIN base_data_product AS p ON p.id = tb.product_id AND p.available = TRUE JOIN base_data_product_category AS pc ON pc.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS pb ON pb.id = p.brand_id LEFT JOIN recursion_mapping AS rm ON rm.node_id = pc.id and rm.node_type = 2
